# 32 — Service Worker Configuration

**File:** `/public/sw.js` (or generated by Workbox via `vite-plugin-pwa`)

---

## Registration (`/src/index.jsx`)
```js
import { registerSW } from 'virtual:pwa-register';

const updateSW = registerSW({
  onNeedRefresh() {
    // Show "New version available" toast with "Update" button
  },
  onOfflineReady() {
    // Show "App ready for offline use" toast
  }
});
```

---

## Caching Strategies

### 1. App Shell — Cache First
```js
// Precached at install time (via Workbox precacheAndRoute)
// Includes: index.html, main JS bundle, CSS, icons
workbox.precaching.precacheAndRoute(self.__WB_MANIFEST);
```

### 2. Lesson API — Network First (with Cache Fallback)
```js
registerRoute(
  ({ url }) => url.pathname.startsWith('/api/lessons'),
  new NetworkFirst({
    cacheName: 'lessons-api',
    networkTimeoutSeconds: 5,    // If no response in 5s, use cache
    plugins: [
      new ExpirationPlugin({ maxEntries: 100, maxAgeSeconds: 7 * 24 * 3600 })
    ]
  })
);
```

### 3. Lesson Media (video/PDF) — Cache First
```js
registerRoute(
  ({ url }) => url.hostname.includes('s3.amazonaws.com'),
  new CacheFirst({
    cacheName: 'lesson-media',
    plugins: [
      new RangeRequestsPlugin(),  // Supports video range requests
      new ExpirationPlugin({ maxEntries: 30, maxAgeSeconds: 30 * 24 * 3600 })
    ]
  })
);
```

### 4. User/Progress API — Network First
```js
registerRoute(
  ({ url }) => url.pathname.startsWith('/api/progress') || url.pathname.startsWith('/api/users'),
  new NetworkFirst({ cacheName: 'user-data', networkTimeoutSeconds: 3 })
);
```

### 5. Fonts/Icons — Stale While Revalidate
```js
registerRoute(
  ({ request }) => request.destination === 'font',
  new StaleWhileRevalidate({ cacheName: 'fonts' })
);
```

### 6. Chat API — Network Only (never cache)
```js
registerRoute(
  ({ url }) => url.pathname.startsWith('/api/chat'),
  new NetworkOnly()
);
```

---

## Background Sync Tags

| Tag | Trigger | Handler |
|-----|---------|---------|
| `sync-progress` | navigator.onLine restores | Flush progress queue |
| `sync-messages` | navigator.onLine restores | Flush message queue |
| `sync-quiz` | navigator.onLine restores | Flush quiz submissions |
| `nightly-sync` | Periodic (24h) | Pull new lessons, flush all |

---

## Push Notifications (future)
```js
self.addEventListener('push', event => {
  const data = event.data.json();
  event.waitUntil(
    self.registration.showNotification(data.title, {
      body: data.body,
      icon: '/icons/icon-192.png',
      badge: '/icons/badge-72.png',
      data: { url: data.url }
    })
  );
});

self.addEventListener('notificationclick', event => {
  event.notification.close();
  clients.openWindow(event.notification.data.url);
});
```

---

## SW Lifecycle
- **Install:** Precache app shell
- **Activate:** Delete old caches from previous versions
- **Fetch:** Route requests through caching strategies above
- **Sync:** Handle background sync tags
- **Push:** Handle push notifications
- **Message:** Communicate with client (e.g. send sync status)

---

## Cache Size Limits
| Cache | Max Entries | Max Age |
|-------|------------|---------|
| `app-shell` | Unlimited (precache) | Until new deploy |
| `lessons-api` | 100 lessons | 7 days |
| `lesson-media` | 30 files | 30 days |
| `user-data` | 50 entries | 1 day |
| `fonts` | 10 | 365 days |
